name: John Kasich
subject: The Store is Open
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Earlier this week, I announced that **I am running for President of the United States**.

Peter, it's critical that we show momentum right now and I could use your help.

Please take a moment to [visit our new online store](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29249134:28062439210:m:1:958431888:702C4EF69F6F495FEAF077B0F6BC8C1B:r) and purchase some items to show your support:

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29249135:28062439210:m:1:958431888:702C4EF69F6F495FEAF077B0F6BC8C1B:r)

You can also visit our website to sign up to get involved or chip in. [JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29249136:28062439210:m:1:958431888:702C4EF69F6F495FEAF077B0F6BC8C1B:r)

Thank you for all that you're doing to help. Together, we can win!

-John

**John Kasich**
Governor of Ohio
[www.JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29249136:28062439210:m:1:958431888:702C4EF69F6F495FEAF077B0F6BC8C1B:r)

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/isEBe2Tm6N). [Update your preferences](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osEBe2Tm6N)

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Watch: Sin, Not Skin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
|
---
| |
### Friend,

We don't have a _skin_ problem in America, we have a _sin_ problem in America.

There is a prescription for our country, though. What is it? Click below and watch...

[ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYxNjYtYTI3YmVkODctYjhjYi00ZTY4LThhOTYtNmUzZDc1ZDdiNmY5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0OTU3MGJhDQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vYmxvZ3M%2fSUQ9Q0ExQjg2NzktMUY0QS00MjQxLTlCOTAtMTRBNDhGMkM5MzdEJnM9OVg1Rg0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d)

### After watching this video I hope you will consider [making a donation](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYxNjYtYTI3YmVkODctYjhjYi00ZTY4LThhOTYtNmUzZDc1ZDdiNmY5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0OTU3MGJhDQpodHRwczovL3d3dy5taWtlaHVja2FiZWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9zPTlYNUYNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t) to my campaign for President so I can bring this message to voters across the nation. If you have watched this video already, please consider an immediate donation in the amount you can afford [here](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYxNjYtYTI3YmVkODctYjhjYi00ZTY4LThhOTYtNmUzZDc1ZDdiNmY5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0OTU3MGJhDQpodHRwczovL3d3dy5taWtlaHVja2FiZWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9zPTlYNUYNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t).
### Sincerely,

Mike Huckabee

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: FWD:: Reject The Iran Deal
body:
Reject The Iran Deal
Earlier this week Senator Graham said, _"The world is literally falling apart... and all we're talking about is Donald Trump."_ Like almost everyone, we're guilty of it too, but the time for fun and jokes is past.

Bottom line, Senator Graham couldn't be more right. We're focused on talking about the serious and critical issues facing our nation, starting with Barack Obama's disastrous deal with Iran.

**Stand with us. Start by[signing our petition that calls on Congress to reject the Iran nuclear deal right now.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29263409:28074495989:m:1:877327319:95B6C134912CDA03BC2C5CAA612C00A0:r)**

Thank you,
Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager

| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

**President Obama's nuclear deal with Iran is dangerous for America and for our allies.**

This deal will not prevent Iran from becoming a nuclear threshold state. In fact, within a few short years, the Iranians will be able to obtain a nuclear weapon with no repercussions.

This deal also does not provide the anytime/anywhere inspections that the world originally demanded.

**The result of this deal: the chance of a military intervention is all the more real. That is the true disaster of this deal.**

[**If you agree with me that this deal must be rejected, I ask for you to join me in calling on Congress to REJECT THE IRAN DEAL.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29263409:28074495989:m:1:877327319:95B6C134912CDA03BC2C5CAA612C00A0:r)

President Obama didn't put America's interests first with this agreement. Instead, he wanted a deal so badly that he conceded too much in the interest of getting a deal.

If this seems crazy to you, Friend, it is. Iran, who has been our enemy and is the world's largest state sponsor of terrorism, is now positioned to receive over a hundred billion dollars from accounts currently frozen. Even worse, we are lifting the embargo that prevents Iran from getting conventional weapons.

**The deal will lead to a nuclear arms race in the Middle East and threatens the very existence of our close ally, Israel.**

_**We must not allow that to happen.**_ I will fight with all means necessary to stop this dangerous deal with Iran. It does not meet the eight principles for a good deal that I laid out earlier this year, so **I am calling on Congress to reject this bad deal.**

Yesterday, I launched the "No Nukes for Iran" tour, a nationwide effort aimed at encouraging members of Congress to vote against this bad deal. Members of Congress will vote on this deal in the next 60 days, so it is critical that the American people contact their representatives and encourage them to vote against this deal.

**When I am president, I will work to implement a good deal with Iran that prevents a nuclear breakout, ensures anytime/anywhere inspections, caps Iran's nuclear ambitions to limited power generation, and provides better stability for the region.**

[**If you agree this deal is bad, then please add your name to the #NoNukesForIran petition.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29263409:28074495989:m:1:877327319:95B6C134912CDA03BC2C5CAA612C00A0:r)

As Benjamin Netanyahu said when this terrible deal was first announced, this is an "_**historic mistake for the world.**_ " Friend, I know that together we can reject this deal and make this an _**historic win**_ for the world.

[**Please let me know if you agree we must immediately reject this Iran deal.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29263409:28074495989:m:1:877327319:95B6C134912CDA03BC2C5CAA612C00A0:r)

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29263409:28074495989:m:1:877327319:95B6C134912CDA03BC2C5CAA612C00A0:r)
|

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW5HeMTmsN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW5HeMTmsN)

name: Columba Bush
subject: It's a party for Jeb and you're invited
body:
Friend,

The first debate is right around the corner where Jeb will step on stage with 9 others running for the White House.

It's a big moment for him, it's a big moment for our campaign, and that's why I want you to be a part of it. We've got one ticket to our Debate Watch Party, and I want to give it to you.

[**Friend , all I need you to do is add your name right now and automatically enter to win an all-expense trip to attend our Debate Watch Party live in Ohio.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pchtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkgvcdf_bqcggbzd.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

If the free ticket, plane ride and hotel weren't enough, here's the truth: **Jeb needs you there**.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ezsljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcqzpr_bqcggbzd.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

During the debate, it will mean a great deal to Jeb knowing you are cheering him on to victory.

If you're not going to do it for yourself, do it for him. [**Add your name to stand by him before he heads on that stage and show him you have his back.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/upwbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjcpmq_bqcggbzd.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[**But hurry, time 's running out, this contest ends soon, and I don't want you to miss out, so add your name right now and be automatically entered!**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wnwqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhjnzv_bqcggbzd.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you and good luck!

Columba Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wngqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhjnzw_bqcggbzd.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=1538&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://jeb2016.com/news/debate_watch_party_official_rules?lang=en). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://www.jeb2016.com/debatewatchcontest). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://www.jeb2016.com/donate/debatewatch?lang=en). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://www.jeb2016.com/debatewatchcontest). Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Tuesday, July 21, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Tuesday, August 4, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time on Tuesday, August 4, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets (one for the winner and one for a guest of the winner’s choice) within the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,000; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two (2) tickets to attend the Debate Watch Party, with an approximate retail value of $5,400; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $6,625. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](https://jeb2016.com/news/debate_watch_party_official_rules?lang=en). The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Fwd: dinner?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
I'd like to have dinner with you. | Friend --

I'd like the chance to get to know you over dinner.

**[All you have to do is enter for the chance to fly out and meet me on the campaign trail for a meal this summer.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMxMTU3MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMjc5MzIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This is our opportunity to spend some time together before things get a little crazier. And I'd bet the food will be pretty good, too.

**The campaign will cover your flight and accommodations, so why not add your name right now?**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/dinner-with-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMxMTU3MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMjc5MzIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Minimum wage
body:
#
Friend,
Today's minimum wage of $7.25 an hour is a starvation wage. We need to raise that to a living wage, because anyone who works 40 hours a week shouldn't live in poverty.
**Yesterday I introduced a bill in Congress to raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour.[Add your name to say you support a $15 minimum wage.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2083/43f17890/5c8f52a4/621d7bb2/355970929/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/min-wage?em150723su-minwage")**
The simple truth is that working people cannot survive on $7.25 an hour. Yet more than 30 million people work every day for a minimum wage that is totally inadequate to provide for their families.
Some of those folks shared with our campaign what a living wage would mean for them, and **I am honored to share some of their stories with you:**
> "I could afford to go back to work if minimum wage was $15. It costs my family less for me to stay home than to pay childcare and transportation costs to work for $9.50/hr." **\- Elizabeth in Ohio**
> "A $15 minimum wage would mean that my daughter and I could finally stop living paycheck to paycheck." **\- Jamie in California**
> "It would make me happy to know the people serving me in restaurants and working in other businesses I patronize are being paid at a higher level that may help them get ahead." **\- Patricia in Indiana**
> "As a single mother of two, a $15 minimum wage would mean being able to sleep at night instead of spending countless sleepless hours worrying about how I'm going to keep a roof over my childrens' heads and food on the table...and maybe even be able to keep more than $5 in my savings account." **\- Nichole in California**
> "I could pay my bills, get health insurance, save for a car, and groceries...I can barely afford bills at the moment and once the bills are paid, no money is left over for anything else." **\- Hilary in Florida**
> "Right now I am making $9.50 an hour. Unfortunately, this is the highest paying job I have ever had and it still is not enough to help me become stable. I was forced to move back in with my mother, which is causing her stress as well because she has to still take care of me after she has already raised 8 children. I feel like a burden and that I should be out on my own, but I'm not. I would be so happy and so content if the minimum wage was raised to $15 in all 50 states! It would mean a new beginning to my life as well as a good start to my mother worrying less." **\- Abbigail in Wisconsin**
[**Add your name to support a $15 minimum wage.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2083/43f17890/5c8f52a4/621d7bb2/355970929/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/min-wage?em150723su-minwage")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2083/43f17890/5c8f52a4/621d7bb2/355970929/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/min-wage?em150723su-minwage")
> "A $15 minimum wage would mean that my daughter and I could finally stop living paycheck to paycheck." **\- Jamie in California**
> "As a small business owner, I believe I would benefit from a larger number of Americans feeling secure in their homes and knowing that they will have enough food for their families. I want to live in a country where we all make enough money to meet not just our basic subsistence needs, but also our need for happiness." **\- Lauren in Iowa**
> "I could stop living paycheck to paycheck!" **\- Sally in South Carolina**
> "I currently work two jobs and go to college full time and I can't afford my own home. I have medical bills that I pay monthly that don't leave me with enough to get by. If the minimum wage were to be raised to $15 an hour, I would not have to work nights and days just to make ends meet. I have a girlfriend, we would like to start a family, but because of finances, this is out of the question." **\- Eric in Oklahoma**
> "It would make my life a hell of a lot better." **\- Sophia in Louisiana**
I hope that it is clear how dire it is for millions of people working full time yet living in poverty. We have a moral obligation to help them.
**[Sign your name next to mine to endorse a $15 minimum wage.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2083/43f17890/5c8f52a4/621d7bb2/355970929/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/min-wage?em150723su-minwage")**
In solidarity,
Bernie

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2083/43f17890/5c8f52a4/621d7bb3/355970929/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150723minwage")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2083/43f17890/5c8f52a4/621d7bb0/355970929/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2083/43f17890/5c8f52a4/621d7bb1/355970929/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2083/43f17890/5c8f52a4/621d7bbe/355970929/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2083/43f17890/5c8f52a4/621d7bbf/355970929/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: This is a tough email to write
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The liberal media is doing everything they can to hide Planned Parenthood's practice of aborting babies, dismembering them and then selling their body parts for profit.

They know, as more is found out, the more the American people recoil in horror and DEMAND action!

But Fellow Conservative, I'm not about to let Planned Parenthood off the hook for this madness.

Yesterday, I introduced an Amendment to H.R. 22 (the vehicle for the highway bill) to Defund Planned Parenthood.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to click here and sign your DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD petition to your U.S. Congressman and Senators right away](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79591-170637-1638026-1dc2d99969-c1e3fae4a0)**.

With the Republican Congress' power of the purse, I believe this is a fight you and I can win -- even with President Obama in the White House.

With your help, I believe this fight will FORCE this issue to the front page of the news (where pro-abortion radicals fear it the most), and save innocent lives in the process.

But time is short. There's no telling when this fight could reach the floor of the U.S. Congress.

_And as I write you, there are new developments every day_!

In fact, the U.S. House's Commerce Committee has already asked Dr. Deborah Nucatola -- Planned Parenthood's Senior Director of Medical Services -- to answer questions about the recent undercover video that launched this scandal.

Like most Americans, I recoiled in horror as I watched Dr. Nucatola brazenly discuss over a bowl of salad how she skirted the federal ban on partial birth abortion and killed unborn babies to ensure she could harvest their organs for sale, stating:

"We've been very good at getting heart, lung, liver, because we know that, I'm not gonna crush that part, I'm gonna basically crush below, I'm gonna crush above, and I'm gonna see if I can get it all intact."

After Philadelphia abortionist Kermit Gosnell's murder trial -- and news of a Texas abortionist twisting babies' heads off who were born alive -- I'm afraid this latest Planned Parenthood scandal is just another example of the abortion lobby's sick radicalism.

_And Planned Parenthood is doing it all with our tax dollars_!

In 2014, Planned Parenthood raked in almost $550 million in taxpayer funding.

Despite the abortion lobby's claims, more tax dollars for Planned Parenthood equals more abortion. PERIOD.

In fact, an 80% increase in funding for Planned Parenthood resulted in a 70% increase in abortion over a ten-year period!

_Yet, virtually all you hear from our national media is silence_.

Where are the tough questions and self-righteous reporters demanding to "get to the bottom of this" like they would if this was a Republican scandal?

With the Republican presidential debate season about to hit full swing, you and I both know reporters are already crafting their gotcha questions to try and skewer conservatives for simply being conservative.

But these same "objective" media mouthpieces give Planned Parenthood and their Democrat allies a free pass?

I haven't heard one member of the media discuss how Hillary Clinton admits she "admires" Margaret Sanger -- the Planned Parenthood founder who makes most Americans' skin crawl with her harsh public statements and issue advocacy, including:

*** Stating, "The most merciful thing that the large family does to one of its infant members is to kill it;"

*** Advocating mandatory government permits to have children;

*** Supporting eugenics and the sterilization of the "feeble-minded" and others for "racial betterment."

With your help, I'm ready to blow the lid off of this new Planned Parenthood scandal.

I believe this organization deserves our scorn. NOT our tax dollars.

And like so many pro-lifers, I've flat-out had it with the media's outrageous bias over the abortion issue.

Less than 24 hours after I announced my candidacy for President of the United States, a reporter in New Hampshire tried to SMEAR me for my pro-life record.

_I turned the tables on pro-abortion Democrats and asked why they aren't ever called to the carpet for their radicalism_.

If the media won't do it, I will.

With your help, I believe this fight will finally show the American people that the Abortion Lobby and their allies in Congress are the true extremists in the fight over abortion.

They're the ones that support killing a seven-pound baby in the womb. They support aborting unborn baby girls -- just because she wasn't the boy someone wanted.

_They're the ones that still support lifting the federal ban on Partial Birth Abortion_!

I know pro-abortion Democrats have to be scared of voting against you and me after news that Planned Parenthood is aborting unborn babies and selling off their organs.

Many know that if they dare to vote against my amendment to STOP all taxpayer funding for Planned Parenthood, they'll likely run into a buzz saw at the polls in 2016.

That's why I believe we can win this fight and set the stage for even more massive pro-life victories with the election of a pro-life President.

As a U.S. Senator, I've earned a 100% pro-life voting record. I've introduced the federal Life at Conception Act to use the U.S. Supreme Court's own words to end abortion-on-demand nationwide.

_I’m leading the fight by introducing an amendment to defund Planned Parenthood_.

And if elected President, I will fight with everything I have to end abortion-on-demand. It's my promise to you.

But first things first.

**[Please click here to sign your DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD petition IMMEDIATELY](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79591-170637-1638026-1dc2d99969-c1e3fae4a0)**.

And if possible, please chip in $20.16 right away.

Your support will help me mobilize millions of pro-lifers from all over the country to help me turn up the heat on Congress.

If you and I can finally DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD, it will save innocent unborn life, expose pro-abortion Democrats' radicalism and set the stage for even more pro-life victories!

So please act at once.

**[Please sign your DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD petition and chip in $20.16 today](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79591-170637-1638026-1dc2d99969-c1e3fae4a0)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79591-170637-1638029-1f064161cc-c1e3fae4a0)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79591-170637-1638031-57ffedad32-c1e3fae4a0)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79591-170637-1638032-3e7207c0f0-c1e3fae4a0)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79591-170637-1638033-b1cf480540-c1e3fae4a0)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79591-170637-1638026-1dc2d99969-c1e3fae4a0)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

P.S. I'm not about to allow our national media to cover up Planned Parenthood's scandal of aborting babies, dismembering them and selling their body parts for profit.

Instead, I'm ready to show the American people just how radical the abortion lobby and their allies in Congress are.

But I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE action.

**[Please sign your DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD petitions and chip in $20.16 TODAY](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79591-170637-1638026-1dc2d99969-c1e3fae4a0)**!

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, The liberal media is doing everything they can to hide Planned Parenthood's practice of aborting babies, dismembering them and then selling their body parts for profit. They know, as more is found out, the more the American people recoil in horror and DEMAND action! But Fellow Conservative, I'm not about to let Planned Parenthood off the hook for this madness. Yesterday, I introduced an Amendment to H.R. 22 (the vehicle for the highway bill) to Defund Planned Parenthood. . With the Republican Congress' power of the purse, I believe this is a fight you and I can win -- even with President Obama in the White House. With your help, I believe this fight will FORCE this issue to the front page of the news (where pro-abortion radicals fear it the most), and save innocent lives in the process. But time is short. There's no telling when this fight could reach the floor of the U.S. Congress. And as I write you, there are new developments every day! In fact, the U.S. House's Commerce Committee has already asked Dr. Deborah Nucatola -- Planned Parenthood's Senior Director of Medical Services -- to answer questions about the recent undercover video that launched this scandal. Like most Americans, I recoiled in horror as I watched Dr. Nucatola brazenly discuss over a bowl of salad how she skirted the federal ban on partial birth abortion and killed unborn babies to ensure she could harvest their organs for sale, stating: "We've been very good at getting heart, lung, liver, because we know that, I'm not gonna crush that part, I'm gonna basically crush below, I'm gonna crush above, and I'm gonna see if I can get it all intact." After Philadelphia abortionist Kermit Gosnell's murder trial -- and news of a Texas abortionist twisting babies' heads off who were born alive -- I'm afraid this latest Planned Parenthood scandal is just another example of the abortion lobby's sick radicalism. And Planned Parenthood is doing it all with our tax dollars! In 2014, Planned Parenthood raked in almost $550 million in taxpayer funding. Despite the abortion lobby's claims, more tax dollars for Planned Parenthood equals more abortion. PERIOD. In fact, an 80% increase in funding for Planned Parenthood resulted in a 70% increase in abortion over a ten-year period! Yet, virtually all you hear from our national media is silence. Where are the tough questions and self-righteous reporters demanding to "get to the bottom of this" like they would if this was a Republican scandal? With the Republican presidential debate season about to hit full swing, you and I both know reporters are already crafting their gotcha questions to try and skewer conservatives for simply being conservative. But these same "objective" media mouthpieces give Planned Parenthood and their Democrat allies a free pass? I haven't heard one member of the media discuss how Hillary Clinton admits she "admires" Margaret Sanger -- the Planned Parenthood founder who makes most Americans' skin crawl with her harsh public statements and issue advocacy, including: * Stating, "The most merciful thing that the large family does to one of its infant members is to kill it;" Advocating mandatory government permits to have children; Supporting eugenics and the sterilization of the "feeble-minded" and others for "racial betterment." With your help, I'm ready to blow the lid off of this new Planned Parenthood scandal. I believe this organization deserves our scorn. NOT our tax dollars. And like so many pro-lifers, I've flat-out had it with the media's outrageous bias over the abortion issue. Less than 24 hours after I announced my candidacy for President of the United States, a reporter in New Hampshire tried to SMEAR me for my pro-life record. I turned the tables on pro-abortion Democrats and asked why they aren't ever called to the carpet for their radicalism. If the media won't do it, I will. With your help, I believe this fight will finally show the American people that the Abortion Lobby and their allies in Congress are the true extremists in the fight over abortion. They're the ones that support killing a seven-pound baby in the womb. They support aborting unborn baby girls -- just because she wasn't the boy someone wanted. They're the ones that still support lifting the federal ban on Partial Birth Abortion! I know pro-abortion Democrats have to be scared of voting against you and me after news that Planned Parenthood is aborting unborn babies and selling off their organs. Many know that if they dare to vote against my amendment to STOP all taxpayer funding for Planned Parenthood, they'll likely run into a buzz saw at the polls in 2016. That's why I believe we can win this fight and set the stage for even more massive pro-life victories with the election of a pro-life President. As a U.S. Senator, I've earned a 100% pro-life voting record. I've introduced the federal Life at Conception Act to use the U.S. Supreme Court's own words to end abortion-on-demand nationwide. I’m leading the fight by introducing an amendment to defund Planned Parenthood. And if elected President, I will fight with everything I have to end abortion-on-demand. It's my promise to you. But first things first. . And if possible, please chip in $20.16 right away. Your support will help me mobilize millions of pro-lifers from all over the country to help me turn up the heat on Congress. If you and I can finally DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD, it will save innocent unborn life, expose pro-abortion Democrats' radicalism and set the stage for even more pro-life victories! So please act at once. . | | In Liberty, Rand Paul P.S. I'm not about to allow our national media to cover up Planned Parenthood's scandal of aborting babies, dismembering them and selling their body parts for profit. Instead, I'm ready to show the American people just how radical the abortion lobby and their allies in Congress are. But I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE action. **! Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Protect Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend -- Today, Jeb Bush announced that he wants to "phase out" Medicare. Yes, you read that right. Jeb Bush wants to "phase out" a vital program that helps millions of Americans, including a good portion of Floridians as well. [**Join me: Denounce Jeb Bush's plan to "phase out" Medicare right now.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2016/738133e4/39327cb1/7f90cffd/1404474459/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-medicare?refcode=ema_2015-07-23_b1_pm") I'm running for Senate because I want to stand up for Florida. And as Senator, I pledge to protect Social Security and Medicare. Millions of Floridians have paid into these programs and count on them every day. We want our elected officials to stand with seniors, not against them. Florida's seniors need elected officials who will stand up for them and the programs they count on. With your help, I know we can continue to fight for the needs of Floridians, both in Washington and in Florida. I have always counted on you before, and am grateful to have you standing with me today. [**Stand with me: Denounce Jeb Bush's plan to "phase out" Medicare right now.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2016/738133e4/39327cb1/7f90cffd/1404474459/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-medicare?refcode=ema_2015-07-23_b1_pm") Patrick | **[TAKE ACTION »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2016/738133e4/39327cb1/7f90cffd/1404474459/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-medicare?refcode=ema_2015-07-23_b1_pm")**
